title: helichrysum incarnatum
intro: Helichrysum incarnatum, also known as the red garlic flower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum incarnatum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
